sections.title: Train with Dani
sections.subtitle: In-home, outdoor & virtual personal training — Denver, CO

sections.text: Six months in and I've hit goals I honestly thought were off the table. Dani completely changed how I think about training.

sections.body: I help busy people get strong without burning out. Programs built around your schedule, your goals, and your body — not a generic app. Available in-home across Denver and the Front Range, or virtually anywhere. First session is always free.

sections.caption: Client progress — 12 weeks, twice a week
